entry_id.description: Stable row identifier assigned during collation. Use as the primary key in the browser.

target_group.description: Broad resistance target category such as Nematode, Oomycete, Fungal, Bacterial, Virus, Herbivore/insect, or Overview.

source_category.description: Source stream for the row, e.g. main review table, supplementary review table, disease-scope row, or supplemental herbivore source.

source_table.description: Original table or supplemental source bucket from which the row was extracted.

source_table_title.description: Title or description of the original source table.

disease_or_pest.description: Disease, pathogen complex, or herbivore target for the resistance entry.

causal_agent_or_species.description: Causal pathogen, nematode, virus, bacterial species, or herbivore species when available.

locus_or_allele.description: Reported locus, QTL, gene, allele, or signal name.

other_name.description: Alternate reported name, synonym, or legacy locus name.

MLG_chr.description: Original molecular linkage group and chromosome text as reported or parsed.

chromosome.description: Parsed chromosome number from 1 through 20; values may be taken directly from the source or deterministically assigned from an explicit legacy MLG.

marker_position.description: Reported marker position or physical interval. Gmax2.0 is preferred when available.

assembly_or_coordinate_system.description: Genome assembly or coordinate system for marker positions.

resistance_spectrum_or_testing_method.description: Race, HG type, isolate, biotype, insect species, testing method, or resistance spectrum details.

PVE_or_effect.description: Phenotypic variation explained, effect size, or qualitative effect text as reported.

population_type_size.description: Mapping or screening population type and sample size.

screening_environment.description: Environment or assay setting, such as greenhouse, field, lab, or multiple environments.

donor_source.description: Resistant donor parent, plant introduction, cultivar, line, or germplasm source.

candidate_genes.description: Candidate gene, cloned gene, or functional annotation when reported.

evidence_status.description: Evidence classification from the collation, including whether rows are review-reported, supplemental, validated, GWAS, or preliminary.

source_reference.description: Primary citation or source label retained from the extraction.

source_url_or_doi.description: URL or DOI where available. Use this to create source links in the browser.

notes.description: Additional extraction notes, caveats, or interpretive comments.

row_quality_flag.description: Data-quality indicator from extraction. Treat rows flagged sparse/continuation or multi-line as needing manual verification.

raw_row_text.description: Raw extracted row text retained for audit and manual correction.

source_col_01.description: Raw source table column 01; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_02.description: Raw source table column 02; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_03.description: Raw source table column 03; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_04.description: Raw source table column 04; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_05.description: Raw source table column 05; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_06.description: Raw source table column 06; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_07.description: Raw source table column 07; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_08.description: Raw source table column 08; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_09.description: Raw source table column 09; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_10.description: Raw source table column 10; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_11.description: Raw source table column 11; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_12.description: Raw source table column 12; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_13.description: Raw source table column 13; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.

source_col_14.description: Raw source table column 14; retained to support manual validation of wrapped PDF/DOCX table rows.
